hero.description: My expertise lies in fault‑tolerant system design, business process digitalisation, and web development. I bring together DevOps practices, modern architecture, and AI‑powered automation.

contact.description: Does your infrastructure need refactoring? Do business processes require automation, and servers — reliable protection? Initiate the communication protocol.
